sinks.expression:

			'/((:?[\r\n|\r|\n]?)# BEGIN (Converter for Media|WebP Converter)(.*?)# END (Converter for Media|WebP Converter)(:?(:?[\r\n|\r|\n]+)?))/s',
			'',
			$code
		)
wp_die( esc_html__( 'Sorry, you do not have permission to do that.', 'webp-converter-for-media' ) )
